ogTitle: Telangatuk East vs Telopea Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Telangatuk East and Telopea Downs.
heading: Telangatuk East vs Telopea Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Telangatuk East, Victoria and Telopea Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Telopea Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Telangatuk East (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Telangatuk East or Telopea Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Telangatuk East has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Telopea Downs scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Telangatuk East scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Telopea Downs scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Telangatuk East or Telopea Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Telopea Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
